property.name: board_identifier
property.brief: An identifier for the board, a macro is generated prefixed with BOARD_.

property.name: board_name
property.brief: A readable name for the board, must not contain double quotes.

property.name: vdd
property.brief: MCU voltage in hundredths of Volt.

property.name: hse_oscillator_mode
property.brief: HSE Oscillator Mode.

property.name: hse_frequency
property.brief: HSE frequency in Hz, unused if mode is set to None.

property.name: lse_oscillator_mode
property.brief: LSE Oscillator Mode.

property.name: lse_frequency
property.brief: LSE frequency in Hz, unused if mode is set to None.

section.name: PHY Settings
section.description: Settings related to the Ethernet PHY.

property.name: address
property.brief: PHY Address or auto-scan mode.

property.name: id
property.brief: PHY identifier number.

property.name: mode
property.brief: PHY connection mode.

section.name: I/O Settings
section.description: I/O pins related settings. All undefined pins are initialized as input with pull-up resistor.

property.name: pins_list
property.brief: Pin modes to be programmed when the HAL is initialized.

property.name: identifiers
property.brief: Pin Identifiers, space-separated names for the pin.

property.name: port
property.brief: Port where the pin belongs to.

property.name: bit
property.brief: Pin bit number within the specified port.

property.name: pin_mode
property.brief: Pin modes such as direction, pull-up/down resistors etc.

property.name: latched_state
property.brief: Logic state to be latched into the output register.

property.name: output_type
property.brief: Output mode setting for output pins.

property.name: output_speed
property.brief: Output speed setting for output pins.

property.name: input_resistor
property.brief: Input resistor setting for input pins.

property.name: alternate_function
property.brief: Alternate function number settings for alternate pins.

section.name: Initialization Code
section.description: Code snippets to be executed at system initialization.

property.name: early_initialization_code
property.brief: Code to be executed immediately after clock initialization and before C runtime initialization.

property.name: late_initialization_code
property.brief: Code to be executed immediately after C runtime initialization and before any defined constructor.

property.name: board_initialization_code
property.brief: Code to be executed after the HAL has been initialized.

property.name: additional_code
property.brief: Additional functions to be added to board.c.
